case_title: TD BANK USA, N.A. VS. ANDREA D CANCHOLA ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-28-2023 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 67741237) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS SCUCCESSOR IN INTERSEST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT CANCHOLA, ANDREA D DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-19-2022
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 67741237) TO PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS SCUCCESSOR IN INTERSEST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 67741237) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS SCUCCESSOR IN INTERSEST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100186937)
DECLARATION RE: VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 67741237) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS SCUCCESSOR IN INTERSEST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-28-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
